no_implied_behavior.description:
Every rule, gate, and contract in plans generated from this template MUST be expressible as:
1. A config entry
2. An executable command
3. An evidence artifact path
4. A pass/fail condition (regex or exit code)
marking_requirement: Items that cannot be expressed this way MUST be marked [NOT_AUTOMATABLE]
Manual steps MUST be escalated with explicit human approval gates

determinism_constraint.description: Plans must produce identical results across runs given identical inputs
requirements: Decision ledger: ALL decisions logged with rationale
Assumption ledger: ALL assumptions tracked with validation methods
File scope enforcement: Hard boundaries per phase
Ground truth levels: Mechanical pass/fail (no human judgment)
Self-healing: Bounded retries with convergence detection

fixed_assumptions.override_policy: If you include any dates/durations, they must be explicitly marked as **optional planning aids** and must not be used as contractual constraints. Place them in PLAN-SEC-020 Appendix B.

global_definition_of_done: All 'must_pass' validations pass in every phase contract
Audit/evidence logs exist at declared locations

ground_truth_levels.description: Explicit validation hierarchy from basic syntax to production deployment. Each level MUST include: command, evidence path, timeout, pass/fail criteria.

levels.name: Static Analysis
levels.description: Lint, type check, security scan pass

levels.name: Unit Tests
levels.description: All unit tests pass, coverage target met

self_healing.description: Bounded, auditable retry logic with convergence detection

allowed_actions: apply deterministic fix pattern from test output
update test fixtures if data contract changed
skip flaky test with waiver justification
mark as known flaky with tracking issue
apply deterministic auto-fix if control allows

post_merge_validations: All tests pass in target branch

isolation_rules: Each worktree writes ONLY to its root
Shared state via .state/ directory (read-only from worktrees)

tool_definitions.purpose: static analysis for security and code quality

ci_parity.notes: All commands must run in CI without interactive prompts
requirements: All inputs via config files or env vars

contract_specification.description: Each phase is represented as a Phase Contract JSON object. No free text in the plan may imply file touches. All file touches live in artifacts[].

non_negotiable_rules: Each phase must be a Phase Contract JSON object
No free text may imply file touches
Every task references only existing artifact_ids_touched and validation_ids
scope.path_policy includes >=1 allowed rule AND >=1 forbidden rule
completion_gate.rules exists and is fully specified
Entry criteria via dependencies.depends_on_phase_ids OR extensions.optional.entry_criteria
Generator phases: core/generated/** in allowed[], NOT in forbidden[]
Non-generator phases: core/generated/** in forbidden[] for create/modify

checks.description: Repo has no uncommitted changes in target paths

phase_contracts.generator_phase_note: If phase.phase_type is 'generator', move core/generated/** out of scope.path_policy.forbidden[].globs and into scope.path_policy.allowed[].globs (with create/modify modes).

artifact_manifest.description: Cross-phase 'bill of materials'. Every file/path created/modified/deleted must be represented here. Source of truth for file touches is artifacts[] inside each phase contract.

checks: All artifact_ids in phase contracts appear in manifest
All paths are unique within action type

validation_gates.description: Global gates that apply across phases. Phase-specific validations are in phase contracts.

gates.name: Control Coverage Enforcement
gates.description: All required quality controls have complete mappings (gates + evidence + artifacts + tests)

risk_register.description: Centralized risk tracking across all phases

phase_specific_deltas.description: Phases can add phase-specific risks/unknowns via extensions.optional.risks_delta[] in phase contract

decision_ledger.description: Append-only log of all decisions made during planning and execution. Every decision must have: context, options, selected, rationale.

tracked_metrics.collection_command: bandit -r src/ -f json | jq '[.results[] | select(.issue_severity | IN("HIGH", "CRITICAL"))] | length'

test_first_development.requirement: Tests must pass 100% (or explicit exception with mitigation)

determinism.description: Verify outputs are stable across runs

invalid_inputs.description: Sample invalid input data with expected errors

gates: 0 high/critical security issues in test code

control_test_mapping.description: Maps quality controls from SEC-021 to required tests

anti_patterns_blocked.detection: Diff size > 2000 lines in single PR
anti_patterns_blocked.mitigation: Break into smaller phases with validation gates

anti_patterns_blocked.detection: File touch not in allowed paths

anti_patterns_blocked.mitigation: Use environment variables or secret store

notes_for_operators: Never modify files outside declared file_scope
Always trust git/tests/filesystem over conversational summaries
If tools under-deliver, repair or escalate—do not silently accept
Use decision ledger for all non-trivial choices

quality_enforcement.description: Mechanical enforcement via linters and gates

no_skeleton_code.description: Final deliverables must be complete and runnable

troubleshooting.issue: pip install fails with dependency conflict
troubleshooting.solution: pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt --force-reinstall
Check PowerShell execution policy: Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser

common_issues.resolution: Review file_scope in phase contract, amend if needed
Review fix attempt logs, identify root cause, manual intervention required
Use fixed seeds, mock time sources, use stable IDs

escalation_paths.action: Invoke fix pattern from allowed actions
Create GitHub issue with fix loop logs

what_was_delivered.description: Phase Plan {{VERSION}} with ALL Deterministic Enhancements

features_delivered.details: {{N}} failure types with explicit action allowlists, max retry budgets, abort conditions
Base ref: {{BRANCH}}, concurrency limit: {{N}} workers, {{MERGE_STRATEGY}} strategy
{{N}} levels (L0-L5) with commands + evidence, per-phase requirements
{{N}} phases with inputs/outputs/invariants, pre/postconditions, failure modes
{{N}} gates with expect/forbid patterns, file content assertions, timeout/retry
{{N}} tracked metrics with quantified targets, JSONL sink, per-phase summaries
All rules expressible as config + command + evidence + pass/fail
{{N}} decisions logged with context, options, rationale, validation

factors: Decision ledger: {{N}} decisions logged with rationale
Assumption ledger: {{N}} assumptions tracked with validation
File scope enforcement: Hard boundaries per phase
Ground truth levels: Mechanical pass/fail (no human judgment)
Self-healing: Bounded retries with convergence detection

post_execution.item: All artifacts present at declared locations
Evidence logs exist for all validations

b_optional_timeline.warning: These are PLANNING AIDS ONLY, not contractual constraints

quality_controls_catalog.description: Single source of truth for proactive quality controls derived from DBG debugging topics. Controls are enforced at planning time via G-CTRL-001 gate.

control_classes.description: Control classification categories mapped from DBG topic areas

controls.name: Input Validation Required
controls.description: All external inputs must be validated before processing

controls.name: No Hardcoded Secrets
controls.description: Secrets must not be hardcoded in source files

controls.name: Minimum Test Coverage
controls.description: Code changes must maintain minimum test coverage threshold

controls.name: Schema Compliance
controls.description: All JSON artifacts must validate against their schemas

controls.name: No Circular Dependencies
controls.description: Module dependencies must form a DAG (no cycles)

control_mappings.description: Maps controls to gates, phases, and test suites

additional_controls.title: API Contract Consistency
additional_controls.intent: Prevent API drift between spec and implementation

additional_controls.title: Test Coverage Minimum
additional_controls.intent: Ensure adequate test coverage before deployment

additional_controls.title: Schema Validation on Input
additional_controls.intent: Prevent malformed input from causing runtime errors

additional_controls.title: Logging Consistency
additional_controls.intent: Enable effective debugging through consistent log format

additional_controls.title: Deployment Rollback Tested
additional_controls.intent: Ensure ability to recover from failed deployments

enforcement_policy.description: Control coverage gate validates all required controls are satisfied
enforcement_policy.algorithm: For each control required by current phase, verify a satisfying gate exists and has passed

error_codes.CTRL001_MISSING_SATISFYING_GATE: Control requires a gate but none found in plan
error_codes.CTRL001_MISSING_EVIDENCE_MAPPING: Control requires evidence but path not defined
error_codes.CTRL001_INVALID_CONTROL_ID: Referenced control_id not found in catalog
